title: KattCo: Management Wanted Modpack
description: A Modpack centered around the Create mod (+ some extras) and Management Wanted!
body:
![MgnmntWntd](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/067321988515672d3e9d5e6b796cecdbb4748f9e.png)

### KattCo. is looking for a business to join them before this world ends, do you have what it takes to maximize how much profit you make off the people around you?
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
This over-packed, ~~totally not buggy~~, absolutely perfect Modpack meant for the grestest of Business people. This modpack aims to eventually be good enough to have people enjoy without as many issues!

With a world to explore, Way too many things to automate, this modpack is all over the place!

## Atributions
- [Farmers Respite](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/farmers-respite) [1.20.1-2.1] by Umpaz, Probleyes
- [CBC: Modern Warfare](https://github.com/GPorubanTKK/CreateBigCannons-ModernWarfare/tree/1.18.2) [0.0.5e+mc.1.20.1-forge] by riftyboi
- [ProjectRed Illumination](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/project-red-illumination) [4.20.0-beta+5] by MrTJP, Chicken Bones, covers1624
- [ProjectRed Exploration](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/project-red-exploration) [4.20.0-beta+5] by MrTJP, Chicken Bones, covers1624
